onChange.template:
[Gameplan: update .gameplan/gameplay/category.schema.json, set gc_difficulty to {{gc_difficulty}}]
Set difficulty to {{gc_difficulty}}. Easy=cooldown 0.7s, grace 3s; Normal=0.5s, 2s; Hard=0.3s, 1.5s; Brutal=0.2s, 1s.

[Gameplan: update .gameplan/gameplay/category.schema.json, set gc_pacing to {{gc_pacing}}]
Set pacing to {{gc_pacing}}. Relaxed=slow cooldowns; Standard=balanced; Frantic=minimal cooldowns for fast chaotic play.

[Gameplan: update .gameplan/gameplay/category.schema.json, set gc_instant_restart to {{gc_instant_restart}}]
Set instant restart to {{gc_instant_restart}}. When off, add a brief delay or animation before restart.

[Gameplan: update .gameplan/gameplay/category.schema.json, set gt_drop_cooldown to {{gt_drop_cooldown}}]
Set DROP_COOLDOWN to {{gt_drop_cooldown}} seconds in scripts/Constants.ts.

[Gameplan: update .gameplan/gameplay/category.schema.json, set gt_merge_cooldown to {{gt_merge_cooldown}}]
Set MERGE_COOLDOWN to {{gt_merge_cooldown}} seconds.

[Gameplan: update .gameplan/gameplay/category.schema.json, set gt_game_over_delay to {{gt_game_over_delay}}]
Set GAME_OVER_DELAY to {{gt_game_over_delay}} seconds.

[Gameplan: update .gameplan/gameplay/category.schema.json, set gt_danger_line to {{gt_danger_line}}]
Set DANGER_LINE_Y to {{gt_danger_line}} pixels. Lower = less space = harder.
